title: Parity: rpl (Rust/Zephyr/Python)
description: Policy: three-impl parity. Module: rpl. Rust: complete (1945 LoC). Zephyr: complete (2668 LoC). Python: complete (1210 LoC). Gap: none - full parity across all three implementations.
close_reason: Verified compliant: Full RPL feature parity across Rust (2128 LoC, 48 tests), Python (1243 LoC, 71 tests), and C/Zephyr (1022 LoC). All implementations have: Trickle timer (RFC 6206), DIO/DAO/DIS/DAO-ACK messages with TLV options, DODAG state machine with MRHOF parent selection/hysteresis/MaxRankIncrease, Source Routing Header (RFC 6554), RoutingTable, and DaoManager. Tests pass in all implementations.
